# Hermes Formal Verification Toolchain

> Hermes is a toolchain for formally verifying Rust code using Aeneas and Lean 4, with a specific focus on memory layout and correctness. This documentation provides the necessary concepts and API definitions for AI agents writing specifications and proofs.

## Core Architecture
[Overall toolchain architecture and integration mechanics](docs/agent/architecture.md)

## Memory Modeling
[Lean formalization of Rust memory, allocations, and bounds](docs/agent/memory_model.md)

## Rust Integration
[How Rust constructs map to Lean traits/axioms](docs/agent/rust_mapping.md)

## Syntax
[How to write specifications and proofs in Rust comments](docs/agent/syntax.md)

## Writing a Proof
[How to write specifications and proofs](docs/agent/writing_a_proof.md). You **MUST** read this before writing a proof.

## Core Sources
[Hermes.lean](src/Hermes.lean) - The foundational Lean definitions and axioms.
